description: While backing out of a crowded mall parking lot, I accidentally hit a concrete pole that was difficult to see due to which my rear side of the car is dented.
During a weekend family trip, a pipe burst in the upstairs bathroom and water leaked into the living room below, damaging furniture and flooring.
A delivery boy claims he twisted his ankle after stepping into a pothole in the parking area of my business property.
I reported my motorcycle theft three days ago and still have not received any guidance on the next steps. I need help urgently.
Strong winds blew part of my backyard shed onto my neighbor's garden, damaging several decorative items.
While my dog was being walked by a family member, it knocked over a cyclist who is now requesting compensation for medical expenses.
Someone scraped the side of my parked vehicle overnight. I am frustrated because this is the second incident this year and there were no witnesses.
An electrical surge after a power outage damaged several appliances in my home, including the refrigerator and washing machine.
The contractor working on my house accidentally cracked a window belonging to the property next door. The neighbor has threatened to take legal action if the matter is not resolved.
After a severe storm, I discovered damage to both my detached garage and the vehicle parked inside it. I am unsure which coverage applies.
